title: Leverage
description: Lord Ashford of Thornfield has been causing problems for Guild operations. Break into his manor and find evidence of his illegal activities. The Guild wants leverage - but what you do with it is up to you.

objectives.description: Break into the manor and reach the study
Return to Vex with the evidence

challenge.description: Manor has guards and locked doors. Being caught alerts the entire household.
challenge.detection_consequences: Quest failure, reputation loss, possible bounty

moral_choice.description: The letters reveal Ashford is trafficking slaves. You can use them for blackmail or expose him publicly.
moral_choice.good_option: Expose Ashford publicly and end the trafficking
moral_choice.neutral_option: Give letters to Guild for blackmail leverage
moral_choice.evil_option: Blackmail Ashford personally for extra gold

notes: Major moral decision. Introduces Shadowmaster Vex. Stealth challenge. Ashford Manor in Thornfield.
